form.div: Action Required: Please provide your comments for this action.

div.style: display: inline-block; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px; padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; background-color: #e3f2fd; border-radius: 5px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; background-color: #e8f5e8; border-radius: 5px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; background-color: #fff3e0; border-radius: 5px;

div.div: 📋 TAR Details (To be approved by lease signatory)

field.name: help
field.p: Get started by creating a new PTL (Permission to Lease) form for tenant management.
